name: Mock Server Generation
description: Mock server generation from contract specs. Generates asyncio HTTP servers that serve valid responses for endpoints defined in OpenAPI or JSON Schema specs. A single MockServer can serve multiple ports simultaneously (for collapsed circuits).

types.name: MockServer

fields.name: _route_tables
fields.description: Mapping of port to route table (path to method to response body)

types.description: In-process mock HTTP server serving canned responses. Can serve routes for multiple ports simultaneously (collapsed mode).

types.name: RouteTable
types.description: Route table mapping paths to HTTP methods to response bodies

functions.name: generate_instance
functions.description: Generate a random valid instance from a JSON Schema. Returns example/default if present, otherwise generates based on schema type.
postconditions: Returns value from 'example' field if present
Returns value from 'default' field if present and no example
Returns first enum value if 'enum' present
For strings: returns formatted value based on format field or random lowercase string
For integers: returns random int between minimum (default 1) and maximum (default 100)
For numbers: returns random float between 0 and 100 rounded to 2 decimals
For booleans: returns True
For arrays: returns list with minItems (default 1) generated instances
For objects: returns dict with all required fields generated
Returns None for unrecognized types

functions.name: parse_openapi
functions.description: Parse an OpenAPI 3.x spec and return route table. Returns mapping of path to HTTP method to response body.

inputs.name: spec_path
inputs.description: Path to OpenAPI spec file (JSON or YAML)

postconditions: Returns empty dict if spec is None or has no 'paths' key
Returns route table with paths as keys
Each path maps HTTP method (uppercase) to response body
Response body generated from 200 or 201 success response schema
Resolves $ref references from components/schemas
Prefers explicit examples over generated instances
Skips methods starting with 'x-' or named 'parameters'

functions.name: parse_json_schema
functions.description: Parse a JSON Schema and return a single-endpoint route table with GET / endpoint.
postconditions: Returns dict with single key '/'
Root path maps 'GET' to generated instance from schema

functions.name: load_routes
functions.description: Load routes from a spec file with auto-detection of format (OpenAPI or JSON Schema). Returns empty dict if file not found or parsing fails.
postconditions: Returns empty dict if file does not exist (logs warning)
Returns empty dict if parsing raises exception
Detects OpenAPI if data contains 'openapi' or 'paths' key
Detects JSON Schema if data contains 'type' or 'properties' key
Returns empty dict for unrecognized formats

structured_side_effects.description: Logs warning if file not found

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize MockServer with empty route tables and server list.
postconditions: _route_tables is empty dict
_servers is empty list

functions.name: add_routes
functions.description: Register routes for a specific port.

inputs.name: routes
inputs.description: Route table mapping path to method to response body

postconditions: _route_tables[port] is set to routes
Overwrites existing routes for port if any

functions.name: add_default_routes
functions.description: Add default health endpoint for a port with no contract. Adds GET / and GET /health.
postconditions: _route_tables[port] contains GET / returning {status: 'mock', port: <port>}
_route_tables[port] contains GET /health returning {status: 'ok'}
Overwrites existing routes for port if any

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start HTTP servers for all registered ports. Creates asyncio servers listening on specified host.
postconditions: Creates asyncio server for each port in _route_tables
Appends each server to _servers list
Logs info message for each started server with host, port, and route count

structured_side_effects.description: Starts TCP server on each port

functions.name: stop
functions.description: Stop all running servers. Closes servers and waits for cleanup.
postconditions: All servers in _servers are closed
_servers list is cleared

functions.name: is_running
functions.description: Property that returns whether any servers are currently running.
postconditions: Returns True if _servers is non-empty
Returns False if _servers is empty

functions.name: _handle
functions.description: Handle an HTTP request: parse request line, match route from port's route table, return canned JSON response (200 OK or 404 Not Found). Implements basic HTTP/1.1 protocol with 5 second timeout on initial read.

inputs.name: port
inputs.description: Port number to look up routes

error_cases.name: timeout
error_cases.condition: Request line not received within 5 seconds

postconditions: Reads HTTP request line with 5 second timeout
Reads and discards remaining headers until blank line
Parses method (default GET) and path (default /) from request line
Looks up route in _route_tables[port][path][method]
Tries alternate path without trailing slash if not found
Returns 404 JSON response if route not found
Returns 200 JSON response with route body if found
Closes writer connection
Logs debug message on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Reads request and writes HTTP response

invariants: logger is initialized with module name __name__
HTTP responses use application/json content type
Default string format generates 5 lowercase letters
Default number range is 0-100 with 2 decimal places
Object generates all required fields (defaults to all properties if not specified)
